prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: game UI popup panel base art for Cocos Creator
Primary request: Create a square wasteland-tech popup panel designed specifically for nine-slice / nine-patch use in a mobile game UI.
Scene/backdrop: transparent background only
Subject: one centered panel frame, front-facing, no perspective
Style: premium post-apocalyptic sci-fi metal UI, worn bronze steel, subtle amber energy seams, dark matte interior, clean game-ready render
Composition: one single square panel occupying most of the canvas, with clear four corners, straight top edge, straight bottom edge, straight left edge, straight right edge, and a calm dark center area suitable for stretching
Technical requirements: the four corners must be visually self-contained and must not depend on long decorative wings; keep all major corner ornaments inside the outer 140px margin; keep the top, bottom, left, and right edge bands consistent so they can be stretched independently; center area should be plain dark brown/charcoal with soft vignette and minimal detail; transparent outside the panel silhouette; no text, no icons, no glow leaks outside the frame, no floating debris, no extra objects
Output goal: ideal source artwork for manual 9-slice splitting into 9 regions without corner distortion
